game: Legacy of the Wizard (NES / Dragon Slayer IV)
note: Machine-readable objective DAG for the agent's frontier planner. Structure + dependencies + boss order are accurate from the walkthroughs; exact in-game item LOCATIONS are placeholders (`location: TBD`) to be grounded later from the room map / playthrough mosaic. The shared world is one big interconnected labyrinth; the family house is the hub the 4 family members enter from.

abilities: only one who can use the Glove to push/move blocks
unlock magic doors with the Key Stick
only one who can use the Mattock to destroy special blocks
can stand on enemies as stepping stones
the only one who wields the Dragon Slayer

dragon_slayer.unlocks: the only weapon that defeats Keela

boss_order_rule: The boss guarding a crown is decided by HOW MANY crowns you've already collected, not which crown or who collects it. So the difficulty sequence is fixed; you control it only by choosing the order you go for crowns. Canonical plan: collect in an order that pairs the weakest family member with the weakest boss.

objectives.desc: Boot, choose a family member at the house, enter the labyrinth
As Pochi: collect Glove + Power Knuckle
As Xemn (needs Glove): collect Hit Rod + Powered Boots + Mattock
As Lyll (needs Mattock): buy Shield, collect Fire Rod + Wings
As Meyna (needs Wings + Hit Rod): collect Key Stick + Armor + Jump Shoes
Pochi reaches Crown 1 and defeats Tarantunes (boss #1, weakest)
Lyll reaches Crown 2 and defeats Erebone (boss #2)
Meyna reaches Crown 3 and defeats Archwinger (boss #3)
Xemn reaches Crown 4 and defeats Rockgaea (boss #4, strongest)
Roas uses the 4 crowns to reveal and retrieve the Dragon Slayer
Roas defeats Keela the king dragon — game complete

ordering_constraint: crown_1..crown_4 must be collected in that sequence so the fixed boss-difficulty progression (Tarantunes < Erebone < Archwinger < Rockgaea) lines up with character strength (Pochi weakest, Xemn strongest). Gathering objectives are chained because each character's access depends on items the previous one collected (Pochi->Glove->Xemn->Mattock->Lyll->Wings->Meyna).
